creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Is it possible to add extra message in IGNORE_WITH_MYSQL "use databases/p5-DBD-mysql4 or databases/p5-DBD-MariaDB instead"?

Or better to use this:
> .if ${MYSQL_FLAVOUR} == mariadb
> IGNORE=use databases/p5-DBD-mysql4 or databases/p5-DBD-MariaDB instead
> .endif
instead of this:
> IGNORE_WITH_MYSQL=	105m 106m 1011m
?
